message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): §5.10.3-5.10.5 physical merge & safety ladder (bd-3dv4)

Implement structured page patches with parse→merge→repack pipeline and
the 4-level commit-time merge policy ladder. Raw XOR merges are forbidden
for SQLite structured pages. Cells are keyed by BLAKE3 semantic digests
aligned with SemanticKeyRef, not physical byte offsets.

12 tests: round-trip, raw XOR ban, ladder levels 1-4, digest alignment,
serial-equivalence, schema epoch mismatch, policy OFF, delete merge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
